repos.name: catchorg/Catch2
repos.desc: A modern, C++-native, test framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD - using C++14, C++17 and later (C++11 support is in v2.x branch, and C++03 on the Catch1.x branch)

repos.name: abseil/abseil-cpp
repos.desc: Abseil Common Libraries (C++)

repos.name: davila7/claude-code-templates
repos.desc: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code

repos.name: google-labs-code/stitch-skills
repos.desc: A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.

repos.name: hashicorp/terraform
repos.desc: Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

repos.name: zeux/meshoptimizer
repos.desc: Mesh optimization library that makes meshes smaller and faster to render

repos.name: openai/plugins
repos.desc: OpenAI Plugins

repos.name: wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
repos.desc: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities

repos.name: chriskohlhoff/asio
repos.desc: Asio C++ Library

repos.name: oven-sh/bun
repos.desc: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one

repos.name: actions/checkout
repos.desc: Action for checking out a repo

repos.name: home-assistant/core
repos.desc: 🏡 Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.

repos.name: microsoft/PowerToys
repos.desc: Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

repos.name: cypress-io/cypress
repos.desc: Fast, easy and reliable testing for anything that runs in a browser.

repos.name: vercel/next.js
repos.desc: The React Framework

repos.name: DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
repos.desc: A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.

repos.name: malisper/pgrust
repos.desc: Postgres rewritten in Rust, now passing 100% of the Postgres regression tests

repos.name: dotnet/aspnetcore
repos.desc: ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

repos.name: prisma/prisma
repos.desc: Next-generation ORM for Node.js & TypeScript | PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, SQLite, MongoDB and CockroachDB

repos.name: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
repos.desc: A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

repos.name: obra/superpowers
repos.desc: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

repos.name: nasa/fprime
repos.desc: F´ - A flight software and embedded systems framework

repos.name: ansible/ansible
repos.desc: Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on remote systems. https://docs.ansible.com.

repos.name: nuxt/nuxt
repos.desc: the full-stack Vue framework

# 🚀 今日 GitHub 热搜：Catch2 霸榜，开发者集体失眠

> 📅 2026-07-12  |  🔍 共收录 24 个热门项目

每天打开 GitHub Trending 的瞬间，就像拆盲盒——你不知道会看到一个改变世界的项目，还是又一个「用 Rust 重写一切」的尝试。今日拆盒结果如下：

---

## 📊 今日统计

主力语言：**TypeScript**: 7 | **C++**: 5 | **Python**: 3 | **JavaScript**: 2 | **Rust**: 2

> TypeScript 又来了。记住：any 是毒药，never 是解药。
